assertions.reason: The live history check stored three session-A messages in chronological order with preserved classification/thread/turn metadata, while `?limit=2` returned only the newest two entries.

A live `POST /sessions/:id/input` with `{type:"prompt",content:"hello remote"}` returned 200 and delivered only `{type:"input",content:"hello remote"}` to session A; the targeted relay-server test also passed the missing/offline rejection cases.
A live `POST /sessions/:id/interrupt` returned 200 and delivered `{type:"interrupt"}` only to session B; the targeted relay-server test also passed the unknown/offline rejection scenarios.

A live attach set `attachedUser` and emitted `attach-status-changed`, a second attach by another user returned 409 conflict, and two detach calls both returned 200 with the session ending detached (`attachedUser: null`).
The live wrapper-facing websocket received `attach-status-changed` with `{attached:true,userId:...}` on attach and `{attached:false}` on detach.
Live routing and history stayed isolated: input reached only session A, interrupt reached only session B, session-A history contained only A messages, and session-B history contained only B messages.

commandsRun.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/server" && node --input-type=module <<'NODE' [live relay history/routing validation script] NODE
commandsRun.observation: The live relay service accepted two registered websocket sessions, returned 200 for attach/input/interrupt/detach, 409 for a second attach by a different user, delivered input only to session A and interrupt only to session B, exposed ordered per-session history with `?limit=2`, and emitted attach-status-changed frames on attach and detach.

commandsRun.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/server" && npx vitest run "src/relay-server.test.ts" -t "delivers REST input and interrupts to the correct wrapper and rejects unavailable sessions|manages attach state, notifies wrappers, and forwards attached session events to callbacks|keeps message history and callbacks isolated per session"
commandsRun.observation: The targeted relay-server suite passed three focused tests, covering unavailable-session 404/409 cases plus attach-state notification/callback and cross-session isolation behaviors.

summary: Validated 6 relay server history/routing assertions on the live API/websocket surface with targeted test support; all assigned assertions passed.
